title: BadPotato
description: badpotato is a minecraft texture pack for 1.8.9
body:
# BadPotato is a 1.8.9 minecraft texture pack used for pvp and it can be used with other packs to
## # the badpotato pack brings a smiple and clean texture for your game and adds very cool swords axes pickaxes bows rods and more we do recommend that you use it with texture packs if you like the pack then please follow me on gamejolt!
![mygamejltact](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90a7ead0388f5cd411f3c943e0a9f02d8f5bcc21_0.webp)

**I will post more about the pack there 
**
